_doc: Data synthesis control — canonical/ is the single source of truth

GAME.notes: 7 eval-active games only. D7 HIGH-tier gin_rummy merged (275 entries). All messages normalized to (role, content) schema.
GAME.audit: 2026-03-19: D7 merge complete. gin_rummy 505→780 (+275 HIGH-tier). Total 2916. Distribution: goofspiel 1050, gin_rummy 780, leduc_poker 428, liars_dice 333, hex 190, clobber 123, othello 12.

NAVWORLD.notes: D10: +111 Claude Sonnet entries (QQR code score >=35/50). Types: intercity 20, multiday 20, business 20, hybrid 19, family_study 19, food_tour 13. Real eval scorer verified.
NAVWORLD.audit: 2026-03-19: D10 Claude Sonnet batch. 2748 + 111 = 2859. All 7 eval types. HF synced.

SWE-SYNTH.notes: Fully cleaned: 368 think-tag entries removed (334 with <think>, 34 with </think> only). Canonical replaced 2026-03-18. seq=8192 needed for most entries.
SWE-SYNTH.audit: 2026-03-18: 983 clean entries, 0 think tags. Original 1351 → removed 368 contaminated.

LIVEWEB.notes: 347 DDB + 39 Claude distillation (21 taostats.io + 18 stooq.com). Now covers 3/5 eval plugins (was 2/5). Weather plugin disabled upstream.
LIVEWEB.audit: 2026-03-19: +39 Claude-distilled entries. taostats.io 21 + stooq.com 18. All fit seq=8192. HF synced.
